SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.chemistry.scale

Class ScaleKinetics

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.chemistry.scale.ScaleKinetics
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class ScaleKinetics extends Object implements Serializable
Screening-level scale precipitation kinetics on top of a thermodynamic saturation index.

A saturation index (SI) tells whether a mineral scale can form, but not how fast or whether the deposit is limited by surface reaction or by mass transport. This class adds that missing kinetic layer to the thermodynamic result produced by ElectrolyteScaleCalculator or ScalePredictionCalculator.

From the supersaturation ratio S = 10^SI = IAP / Ksp the model estimates:

  • Induction time via a classical nucleation form t_ind = k_n * exp(B / (ln S)^2), so induction time falls sharply as supersaturation rises and is infinite at or below saturation.
  • Surface-reaction-limited growth g_rxn = k_r * (S - 1)^n (second order, n = 2 by default), the classic parabolic-in-supersaturation crystal growth law.
  • Mass-transport-limited growth g_mt = k_m * (c_bulk - c_eq), the diffusion of scaling ions to the surface.
  • Limiting regime — the smaller of the two growth rates governs; the class reports whether deposition is REACTION- or TRANSPORT-limited (or NONE below saturation).

The rate constants are tunable and default to field-typical screening values; they are not a substitute for mineral-specific laboratory kinetics. Standards informational: NACE TM0374, NORSOK M-001.

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL
See Also:
  • ElectrolyteScaleCalculator
  • ScaleDepositionAccumulator

    • ScaleKinetics

      public ScaleKinetics()

  • Method Details

    • setSaturationIndex

      public ScaleKinetics setSaturationIndex(double si)
      Sets the thermodynamic saturation index driving the kinetics.
      Parameters:
      si - saturation index log10(IAP/Ksp)
      Returns:
      this for chaining

    • setSurfaceReaction

      public ScaleKinetics setSurfaceReaction(double rateConstantMmYr, double order)
      Sets the surface-reaction rate constant and reaction order.
      Parameters:
      rateConstantMmYr - surface rate constant in mm/yr (must be non-negative)
      order - reaction order in supersaturation excess (typically 1 to 2)
      Returns:
      this for chaining

    • setMassTransfer

      public ScaleKinetics setMassTransfer(double coeffMs, double bulkMolL, double equilibriumMolL)
      Sets the mass-transfer coefficient and the bulk and equilibrium concentrations of the limiting scaling ion.
      Parameters:
      coeffMs - mass-transfer coefficient in m/s (must be non-negative)
      bulkMolL - bulk concentration in mol/L
      equilibriumMolL - equilibrium concentration in mol/L
      Returns:
      this for chaining

    • setNucleation

      public ScaleKinetics setNucleation(double constantHours, double shapeFactor)
      Sets the nucleation pre-exponential constant and exponential shape factor.
      Parameters:
      constantHours - nucleation pre-exponential constant in hours (must be non-negative)
      shapeFactor - exponential shape factor B (must be non-negative)
      Returns:
      this for chaining

    • evaluate

      public ScaleKinetics evaluate()
      Evaluates the induction time, growth rates, and limiting regime from the current inputs.
      Returns:
      this for chaining

    • getSupersaturationRatio

      public double getSupersaturationRatio()
      Gets the supersaturation ratio S = 10^SI.
      Returns:
      supersaturation ratio (dimensionless)

    • getInductionTimeHours

      public double getInductionTimeHours()
      Gets the estimated nucleation induction time.
      Returns:
      induction time in hours (positive infinity at or below saturation)

    • getSurfaceLimitedGrowthMmYr

      public double getSurfaceLimitedGrowthMmYr()
      Gets the surface-reaction-limited growth rate.
      Returns:
      surface-limited growth rate in mm/yr

    • getTransportLimitedGrowthMmYr

      public double getTransportLimitedGrowthMmYr()
      Gets the mass-transport-limited growth rate.
      Returns:
      transport-limited growth rate in mm/yr (0 if no transport data supplied)

    • getEffectiveGrowthRateMmYr

      public double getEffectiveGrowthRateMmYr()
      Gets the effective (rate-controlling) growth rate.
      Returns:
      effective growth rate in mm/yr

    • getLimitingRegime

      public String getLimitingRegime()
      Gets the limiting regime label.
      Returns:
      "REACTION", "TRANSPORT", or "NONE" (below saturation)

    • ensureEvaluated

      private void ensureEvaluated()
      Ensures evaluate() has been called before returning a result.

    • toJson

      public String toJson()
      Serialises the kinetic result to a JSON string.
      Returns:
      a pretty-printed JSON representation
